news.title:
Adani Ports completed cash tender offers for 2027, 2031 notes.
Purchased $345.1M of 4% notes (2027) & $150M of 3.1% notes (2031).
news.summary:
Adani Ports completed cash tender offers for 2027, 2031 notes.
Purchased $345.1M of 4% notes (2027) & $150M of 3.1% notes (2031).

news.title: JP Morgan initiates Overweight rating on Adani Ports with target price Rs 1944.
news.summary: JP Morgan initiates Overweight rating on Adani Ports with target price Rs 1944.

news.title:
JPMorgan rates Adani Ports overweight, citing capacity growth, trade rise, and efficiency.
JSW Infra highlighted for logistics, warehousing expansion, and improved margins.
news.summary:
JPMorgan rates Adani Ports overweight, citing capacity growth, trade rise, and efficiency.
JSW Infra highlighted for logistics, warehousing expansion, and improved margins.

news.title:
HAL secures Rs 2,901 crore defence contract; Dabur acquires stake in RAS Beauty for Rs 60 crore.
Adani Ports reports 16% YoY cargo growth; Cipla forms JV with Kemwell Biopharma for biologics development.
news.summary:
HAL secures Rs 2,901 crore defence contract; Dabur acquires stake in RAS Beauty for Rs 60 crore.
Adani Ports reports 16% YoY cargo growth; Cipla forms JV with Kemwell Biopharma for biologics development.

news.title:
Adani Ports handled 42.5 MMT cargo in Feb'26, up 16% YoY.
YTD cargo reached 454.7 MMT, rising 11% YoY; rail volume up 3%.
news.summary:
Adani Ports handled 42.5 MMT cargo in Feb'26, up 16% YoY.
YTD cargo reached 454.7 MMT, rising 11% YoY; rail volume up 3%.

news.title:
Geopolitical tensions impact Indian markets; Nifty, Sensex expected to open lower as crude prices surge.
Stocks in focus: Adani Ports, ONGC, BEL, Airtel, Tata Motors, Aurobindo Pharma, SpiceJet, Vishal Mega Mart.
news.summary:
Geopolitical tensions impact Indian markets; Nifty, Sensex expected to open lower as crude prices surge.
Stocks in focus: Adani Ports, ONGC, BEL, Airtel, Tata Motors, Aurobindo Pharma, SpiceJet, Vishal Mega Mart.

news.title:
Adani Ports confirms Haifa Port infrastructure fully secure and operational amid Middle East conflict.
US and Israel attacked Iran, leading to regime change calls and killing Ali Khamenei.
news.summary:
Adani Ports confirms Haifa Port infrastructure fully secure and operational amid Middle East conflict.
US and Israel attacked Iran, leading to regime change calls and killing Ali Khamenei.

news.title:
IRFC's OFS saw 95% subscription, raising concerns about government divestment appetite amid market uncertainties. Adani Ports repurchased $196.9M bonds, aiming to manage debt and reassure investors.
Lodha Developers acquired Malabar Hill land for Rs 2,800 crore project. Vikram Solar focuses on domestic growth despite US trade duties. Lupin faces GST probe; RIL boosts digital ecosystem with Facebook.
news.summary:
IRFC's OFS saw 95% subscription, raising concerns about government divestment appetite amid market uncertainties. Adani Ports repurchased $196.9M bonds, aiming to manage debt and reassure investors.
Lodha Developers acquired Malabar Hill land for Rs 2,800 crore project. Vikram Solar focuses on domestic growth despite US trade duties. Lupin faces GST probe; RIL boosts digital ecosystem with Facebook.

news.title:
IRFC, Adani Ports, Lodha Developers, Lupin, RIL stocks in focus as markets close in green.
Analysts warn of potential downside despite market recovery after Tuesday's decline.
news.summary:
IRFC, Adani Ports, Lodha Developers, Lupin, RIL stocks in focus as markets close in green.
Analysts warn of potential downside despite market recovery after Tuesday's decline.

news.title:
Adani Ports secured $197M from early tenders in USD bond buyback.
The buyback program is aimed at improving the company's liabilities.
news.summary:
Adani Ports secured $197M from early tenders in USD bond buyback.
The buyback program is aimed at improving the company's liabilities.

news.title:
Adani Ports reveals early results of debt note tender offers, targeting $345.1M (4.0%) due 2027 and $150M (3.10%) due 2031.
Valid tenders include $101.6M (4.0%) and $95.36M (3.10%), with early settlement around Feb 27, 2026.
news.summary:
Adani Ports reveals early results of debt note tender offers, targeting $345.1M (4.0%) due 2027 and $150M (3.10%) due 2031.
Valid tenders include $101.6M (4.0%) and $95.36M (3.10%), with early settlement around Feb 27, 2026.

news.title:
Adani Ports has incorporated Astro Offshore ME Ltd in UAE on Feb 24, 2026.
The subsidiary focuses on ship management with an authorized capital of 50 shares of USD 1000 each.
news.summary:
Adani Ports has incorporated Astro Offshore ME Ltd in UAE on Feb 24, 2026.
The subsidiary focuses on ship management with an authorized capital of 50 shares of USD 1000 each.

news.title:
GIFT Nifty signals a weak start; Nifty futures down 0.5% at 25,592.5. Sensex gained 479.95 points, closing at 83,294.66.
Top Nifty gainers: Adani Ports, Dr. Reddy's, Kotak Mahindra. IT sector fell 1.4%, PSU Bank index rose 1.3%; volatility persists.
news.summary:
GIFT Nifty signals a weak start; Nifty futures down 0.5% at 25,592.5. Sensex gained 479.95 points, closing at 83,294.66.
Top Nifty gainers: Adani Ports, Dr. Reddy's, Kotak Mahindra. IT sector fell 1.4%, PSU Bank index rose 1.3%; volatility persists.

news.title:
Adani Ports surged 3% as Sensex rose 480 points, Nifty above 25,700.
Dr Reddy's gained 2% alongside broader market recovery.
news.summary:

news.title:
Adani Ports gains 3% after signing MoU with NMDC and Brazil's Vale.
Market breadth remains neutral; NSE advance-decline ratio stands at 1:1.
news.summary:
Adani Ports gains 3% after signing MoU with NMDC and Brazil's Vale.

news.title:
Bharti Airtel launches AI Cyber Threat Research Centre; IDFC First Bank uncovers ₹590 crore fraud at Chandigarh branch.
NTPC Green starts 158 MW Kadapa solar, UPL announces restructuring; Adani Ports signs MoU for iron ore blending facility.
news.summary:
Bharti Airtel launches AI Cyber Threat Research Centre; IDFC First Bank uncovers ₹590 crore fraud at Chandigarh branch.
NTPC Green starts 158 MW Kadapa solar, UPL announces restructuring; Adani Ports signs MoU for iron ore blending facility.

news.title:
APSEZ's subsidiary AGPL signs MoU with NMDC & Vale S.A. to develop an iron ore blending facility.
The project includes creating an SEZ ecosystem at Gangavaram Port on India's East Coast.
news.summary:
APSEZ's subsidiary AGPL signs MoU with NMDC & Vale S.A. to develop an iron ore blending facility.
The project includes creating an SEZ ecosystem at Gangavaram Port on India's East Coast.

news.title:
Adani Ports signed an MoU with NMDC and Vale Brazil for iron ore collaboration.
Gangavaram Port's capacity to increase to 75 MMT, aiming for a global export hub.
news.summary:
Adani Ports signed an MoU with NMDC and Vale Brazil for iron ore collaboration.

news.title: Adani Ports raised ₹10B via 5-year bonds at a 7.52% coupon rate.
news.summary: Adani Ports raised ₹10B via 5-year bonds at a 7.52% coupon rate.

news.title:
SC overturns Gujarat's order to recover 108 hectares from Adani Ports.
Court cites violation of natural justice in Gujarat's reclamation process.
news.summary:
SC overturns Gujarat's order to recover 108 hectares from Adani Ports.
Court cites violation of natural justice in Gujarat's reclamation process.
